text: This is a runtime validation request after restarting the local app and running the local detector process. The payload includes enough words to satisfy the route minimum requirement and force a real detector call. We include additional plain English sentences to ensure the word count is comfortably above eighty and to avoid short text validation responses. The expected result is a successful JSON response from /api/ai-detector with aiGenerated and humanWritten fields present and no detector unavailable error. This confirms the immediate runtime issue is resolved for local testing without waiting for any further deployment activity.
